channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Garmin’s top watches are cheaper than ever this weekend — up to 35% off the Vivoactive 6, Forerunner 265, Instinct 3 and more
item.description: There are huge discounts on Garmin watches this weekend, and I'm rounding up the top deals, including up to 35% off the Vivoactive 6, Forerunner 265, and Instinct 3.

item.title: Playing Return to Monkey Island reminded me of the point-and-click adventures of my youth
item.description: I've finally found time to dive into the sixth Monkey Island game, which originally came out in 2022.

item.title: What to read this weekend: The new Image Comics miniseries, Of the Earth
item.description: Here's what we recommend this week.

item.title: 'We are putting quantum inside the rack so customers can roll it in, plug it in': The world’s first rack-mounted quantum computer is here — and it runs at -459 degrees Fahrenheit from a standard wall socket
item.description: Equal1's RacQ fits seamlessly into a standard Dell frame for easy future deployment.

item.title: Le plein d’essence à 42 cts en électrique, le porte vélo abordable de Thule et les batteries sans lithium de Volkswagen – Récap’ Survoltés
item.description: L’actualité Survoltés a été riche cette semaine : le plein d'essence à 42 centimes en électrique, les batteries sans lithium avec Volkswagen ou encore être payé pour consommer de l'électricité. Voici ce qu'il ne fallait pas manquer.

item.title: ‘Pure, beautiful minimalism’: the reMarkable Paper Pure delivers a flawless pad-and-pen experience — but I still can't believe there's no frontlight
item.description: I tested the reMarkable Paper Pure, and it's the reMarkable 3 in all but name.

item.title: The walking sandals my entire family wears just got a rare discount — up to 50% off bestselling Teva sandals
item.description: Tevas straddle the line between style and functionality; they're the perfect vacation shoe.

item.title: Boulanger brade ce casque JBL (ANC, 76 heures d’autonomie) à moins de 100 €
item.description: Le JBL Tune 780NC est un casque complet. Sur les oreilles, il est confortable, dispose d'un son personnalisable et d'une autonomie qui tiendra même lors des voyages les plus longs. En ce moment, il est disponible pour seulement 89,99 euros chez Boulanger.
